channel.title: Local Praxis — Writing
channel.description: Notes on software, small business, and building things that last. From James Johnson in Port Aransas, TX.

item.title: The quiet tax on local businesses
item.description: A percentage-of-revenue SaaS fee is not a line item. It is a variable tax that scales against your business. Running the math on a Port Aransas charter operation.
item.author: jim@localpraxis.com (James Johnson)

item.title: Notes on the design
item.description: Why the Local Praxis site looks like a printed design manual instead of a SaaS landing page, and what that's meant to communicate.
item.author: jim@localpraxis.com (James Johnson)

item.title: Why I'm Writing This
item.description: A short note on why a one-person software shop in Port Aransas, TX is starting a blog.
item.author: jim@localpraxis.com (James Johnson)
